exploration_notes:
The three repos use distinct patterns for Prometheus metric registration:

**kubernetes/kubernetes**: Wraps Prometheus types with a stability framework in `staging/src/k8s.io/component-base/metrics/`. Custom types (Counter, Gauge, Histogram) in counter.go, gauge.go, histogram.go wrap `prometheus.NewCounterVec` etc. A custom `kubeRegistry` (registry.go) provides `MustRegister` with stability-level annotations and deprecation tracking. The `legacyregistry` package provides global convenience funct
